Enterprise

Trustless talent for teams that can't afford surprises

Custom escrow contracts, SLA-backed delivery verification, dedicated support, and volume pricing. Built for procurement teams, agencies, and tech companies operating at scale.

Custom escrow logic

Configure milestone-based releases, partial payments, and custom dispute resolution rules.

Verified talent pools

Build private talent pools with background-checked, pre-screened freelancers.

API integration

Programmatically post jobs, manage contracts, and trigger payments via REST API.

SSO & team access

SAML-based SSO, role-based access control, and audit logs for compliance.

Priority support

Dedicated account manager, 99.9% SLA uptime, and 4-hour response windows.

Volume pricing

Flat rate contracts for high-volume teams. No per-transaction fees over threshold.

Get in touch

We'll reach out within one business day.
